g.text: OCI Service Gateway Reconcile State Machine
read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- Pagination and field-level drift are still documented
primarily in Go code and property tests.
- The services collection is reconciled in implementation,
but the current formal profile does not model it as a
- Confirm deletion with follow-up GetServiceGateway calls
until the resource is gone or not found.
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
OCI deletion is confirmed and the finalizer can be removed
